race.comment: Very tough. Siding with BENAGIL (1) who ran a solid race first up in the G3 Mannerism at Caulfield over 1400m, lugging the 60kg there and working home fairly for a narrow fifth. Out to 1600m second up suits, fancy she can take more improvement than a few rivals. DAMASK ROSE (5) has been solid in two runs back but is becoming a bit frustrating. The Mannerism looked her race on paper and she seemed to have her chance. Don't mind the wide draw and out to a mile for her. SEA WHAT I SEE (8) stuck on well fresh in the G3 Tressady and will be better to this trip. She lands in a good spot here and takes catching. TOO DARN DISCREET (6) was behind her there when well supported. 1400m was too sharp for her, this trip can see sharp improvement.
